name: agrolith-ai-web

scripts.build: echo 'Building Agrolith-AI Web App...' && mkdir -p dist && cp -r index.html index.css app.js dist/ 2>/dev/null || copy index.html dist\ && copy index.css dist\ && copy app.js dist\
